creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Peter Non-ports committers can commit to the ports tree with a review and/or confirmed QA (portlint/poudriere) and a ports committer to approve the commit.

If the quarterly version of this port is affected, the bugfix and version update should be attached/committed separately, so that the former can be merged

Id also recommend (separate to this issue) updating MAINTAINER lines in ports you maintain to your FreeBSD.org address.

Maintainer is committer, assign accordingly
